# Fixture licenses

All fixtures except `music_stereo_44100` are generated by the repository's
ffmpeg lavfi expressions. Those generated signals, encoded Ogg files, and
decoded reference PCM files are dedicated to the public domain under
CC0-1.0.

`music_stereo_44100` is derived from the recorded Salamander Grand Piano v3:

- Original author and recording: Alexander Holm
- License: Creative Commons Attribution 3.0 Unported (CC BY 3.0)
- Original archive: <https://archive.org/details/SalamanderGrandPianoV3>
- Instrument repository: <https://github.com/sfzinstruments/SalamanderGrandPiano>

The three-second source phrase and its Ogg/reference derivatives remain under
CC BY 3.0. The committed source is
`tool/fixture_sources/salamander_phrase.flac`.

The temporary reference decoder is stb_vorbis by Sean Barrett and
contributors, offered as public domain or MIT at the user's option. Its pinned
source is downloaded into `.dart_tool/` and is not redistributed here.
